title: helichrysum angavense
intro: Helichrysum angavense, also known as the 'Aldabra velvet leaf' or 'Velvet leaf', is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the island of Aldabra in the Seychelles, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Helichrysum angavense can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate various health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems.
